provider.description: Email provider preset. When set, automatically fills imap_host, imap_port, imap_use_ssl, smtp_host, smtp_port, smtp_use_tls, smtp_use_ssl. Any field you explicitly set overrides the preset. Set to null to configure all IMAP/SMTP fields manually.

email.description: Your full email address used both for authentication and as the From address when sending.

password.description: Account password or app-specific password. For Gmail, Yahoo, and iCloud with 2FA enabled, generate an App Password from your account security settings instead of your regular login password.

imap_host.description: IMAP server hostname. Auto-filled by provider preset. Required if provider is null.

imap_port.description: IMAP server port. 993 is the standard encrypted port (requires imap_use_ssl=true). All supported providers use 993.

imap_use_ssl.description: Connect to the IMAP server using SSL/TLS from the start. Must be true when imap_port is 993.

smtp_host.description: SMTP server hostname. Auto-filled by provider preset. Required if provider is null.

smtp_port.description: SMTP server port. 587 uses STARTTLS (set smtp_use_tls=true, smtp_use_ssl=false). 465 uses SSL-on-connect (set smtp_use_ssl=true, smtp_use_tls=false). 587 with STARTTLS is the recommended modern standard.

smtp_use_tls.description: Upgrade the SMTP connection to TLS using STARTTLS after connecting. Use with smtp_port=587. Mutually exclusive with smtp_use_ssl.

smtp_use_ssl.description: Connect to the SMTP server using SSL/TLS from the start. Use with smtp_port=465. Mutually exclusive with smtp_use_tls.
